meta.title: A Conversation w/ Deputy Assistant Secretary Robert Soofer & Dr. Jim Miller
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with the Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Nuclear and Missile Defense Policy Dr. Robert Soofer and Senior Fellow at Johns Hopkins University’s Applied Physics Lab and former Under Secretary of Defense for Policy Dr. Jim Miller. The conversation was moderated by Hudson Senior Fellow Rebeccah Heinrichs.
